headline: PTC INC (NASDAQ:PTC) Screens as a Classic Peter Lynch GARP Investment
summary: Discover how PTC Inc. meets Peter Lynch's GARP strategy with strong growth, 32% ROE, low PEG of 0.47, and a P/E of 12, making it a value buy.
